hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git push' || exit 0; cargo fmt --all -- --check 1>&2 || { echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Pre-push blocked: cargo fmt --all -- --check failed. Run: cargo fmt --all"}'; exit 1; }; dx fmt --check -p ptcgp-db 1>&2 || { echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Pre-push blocked: dx fmt --check -p ptcgp-db failed. Run: dx fmt -p ptcgp-db && cargo fmt --all"}'; exit 1; }; cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings 1>&2 || { echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Pre-push blocked: cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings failed. Fix clippy warnings before pushing."}'; exit 1; }; RUSTFLAGS="-D warnings" cargo test --workspace 1>&2 || { echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Pre-push blocked: cargo test --workspace failed. Fix failing tests before pushing."}'; exit 1; }
